name: 72"x14" Holly Berry Table Runner - Threshold™
description:
Add a warm, festive touch to your dining table with this Holly Berry Table Runner from Threshold™. This rectangular table runner is adorned with a holly berry print in white and red tones down the center against a white backdrop for a beautiful look that pairs well with a variety of serveware. The cotton-linen construction with cotton backing helps protect your table from accidental spills, and it can be machine washed for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
